about_purpose_text: A local-first desktop GUI for NASA/JPL SBDB Close Approach Data, local Ollama explanations, and approximate 3D intuition views.
about_scientific_text: This app uses JPL CAD summary records. It is not a replacement for CNEOS risk pages, JPL Horizons, SPICE kernels, MPC observations, or professional orbit determination.
about_privacy_text: CAD queries go to the NASA/JPL public API. LLM analysis is sent only to the configured local Ollama endpoint.
sim_default_text:
Select a CAD row, then create a local 3D HTML view.

Important: CAD records are close-approach summaries. This module creates a synthetic flyby from miss distance and relative velocity. It is useful for scale intuition and sensitivity experiments, not for authoritative orbit propagation.
ollama_running: Ollama request running. You can switch tabs; the result will appear here when finished.
ollama_sending: Sending selected record to local Ollama...
ollama_ignored_notice: Ollama request is still finishing in the background; its result will be ignored.
status_ollama_ignored: Running Ollama result will be ignored.
followup_placeholder: Ask Ollama a follow-up based on the analysis...
followup_no_record_context: No CAD record is currently selected.
ollama_followup_running: Ollama follow-up request running. You can switch tabs; the answer will be appended here.
ollama_busy_followup: Wait for the current Ollama request to finish or ignore its result before asking a follow-up.
no_analysis_for_followup: Create an Ollama analysis or local heuristic summary first, then ask a follow-up.
tip_fetch_data: Fetch close-approach records from the public NASA/JPL CAD API using the filters above.
tip_preset_next_60: Set a broad Earth NEO search for the next 60 days.
tip_preset_close_365: Set a one-year close-approach search for objects within roughly 10 lunar distances.
tip_preset_apophis: Set the query to Apophis 2029 using the object designation 99942.
tip_neo_filter: Limit broad searches to near-Earth objects. Disabled automatically for specific designations.
tip_pha_only: Show only potentially hazardous asteroids in broad searches.
tip_nea_only: Show only near-Earth asteroids in broad searches.
tip_comets_only: Show only comet entries in broad searches.
tip_include_diameter: Request diameter estimates where the API can provide them.
tip_include_fullname: Request the full object name where available.
tip_list_models: Refresh the model selector from the local Ollama server.
tip_analyze_selected: Send the selected CAD row to your local Ollama model for a careful textual assessment.
tip_local_summary: Create a fast local rule-based summary without contacting Ollama.
tip_cancel_ollama: Ignore a running Ollama result if you start another local summary or no longer need the answer.
tip_followup_prompt: Enter a follow-up question. Ollama receives the selected record plus the visible analysis as context.
tip_send_followup: Send the follow-up question to Ollama and append the answer to the analysis view.
tip_print_analysis: Open the system print dialog for the formatted analysis view.
tip_copy_analysis: Copy the visible analysis as plain text to the clipboard.
tip_open_3d: Generate and open a local WebGL/Plotly 3D visualization in your browser.
tip_save_3d: Generate the local 3D HTML file without opening the browser.
tip_browse_output: Choose where generated visualization and output files are stored.
tip_save_options: Save language, theme, Ollama, timeout and output settings.
tip_language: Change the UI language. Texts and tooltips update immediately.
tts_no_text: There is no analysis text to read aloud yet.
tts_windows_only: Windows text-to-speech is available only on Windows systems.
status_tts_running: Reading analysis aloud with Windows TTS...
tip_read_analysis: Read the visible analysis aloud using Windows text-to-speech.
tip_stop_tts: Stop the current Windows text-to-speech playback.
tip_tts_scope: Choose whether Read aloud speaks only the latest Ollama/local answer or the entire visible analysis/chat.
tip_context_length: Context length passed to Ollama. Higher values can preserve more analysis/chat context but may use more memory and run slower.
value_not_available: not available in this CAD record
change_summary_changed: Changed CAD values since the previous cached fetch:
status_startup_fetch: No CAD cache found; fetching initial NASA/JPL CAD data...
status_loaded_cache: Loaded {count} CAD records from local cache ({stamp}).
status_loaded_live: Loaded {count}{total} CAD records. API version: {version}. URL: {url}
no_matching_records: No matching records. Try a wider date range or distance filter.
include_ollama_disclaimer: Include scientific limitation notes in Ollama output
include_visualization_disclaimer: Include compact scientific note below 3D view
tip_include_ollama_disclaimer: When enabled, Ollama is asked to include CAD/simulation limitation notes. When disabled, repeated general disclaimers are suppressed.
tip_include_visualization_disclaimer: When enabled, generated 3D HTML includes a compact collapsible note below the visualization. Usage Notes remain the main explanation area.
optional_filter_note: Optional empty filter fields mean: no restriction for that value.
tip_date_min: Start date for the CAD query. Examples: now, 2029-01-01.
tip_date_max: End date for the CAD query. Examples: +60, 2029-12-31.
tip_distance_max: Maximum close-approach distance in au. Example: 0.05.
tip_designation: Optional object designation, SPK ID, or name. Leave empty for a broad search.
tip_h_min: Optional lower absolute-magnitude H limit. Leave empty for no lower H filter.
tip_h_max: Optional upper absolute-magnitude H limit. Leave empty for no upper H filter.
tip_vrel_min: Optional minimum relative velocity in km/s.
tip_vrel_max: Optional maximum relative velocity in km/s.
tip_body: Approach body used by the CAD API, for example Earth or Moon.
tip_sort: Sort order used by the CAD API result list.
tip_orbit_class: Optional orbit-class filter. Any means no orbit-class restriction.
tip_limit: Maximum number of CAD rows requested from the API.
ollama_unavailable_short: Start Ollama and then retry the action. The technical details were written to a log file instead of being shown as a traceback.
ollama_unavailable_message: The app could not connect to the configured Ollama server. This usually means Ollama is not started, the local service is not running, or the Ollama URL is wrong.
ollama_found_executable: A local Ollama executable was found: {path}
ollama_not_found_hint: Ollama was not found automatically. You can install it from the Ollama website and then start it before retrying.
ollama_start_failed: The app found Ollama, but could not start the local service. Start Ollama manually and retry.
tip_assessment_mode: Controls whether Ollama should stay close to directly supported facts or may provide broader scientific or what-if assessment.
tip_include_heuristic_notes: When enabled, the GUI/prompt explicitly labels local computed triage and risk-score values. When disabled, repeated heuristic caveats are suppressed.
usage_notes_html:
Usage Notes

This tab explains compact values shown in the main table.

Column coloring and value sources

Normal headers indicate CAD/API values or direct unit conversions. Differently colored headers mark app-derived columns. LLM-corrected cells are highlighted only after manual apply.

Current encounter score vs. orbital hazard

Risk score is a local current-close-approach encounter score. It is not an official PHA classification and not a MOID-based long-term orbital hazard score.

Risk-score formula

The score uses nominal close-approach distance as the main term, estimated size as damage context, relative speed as a smaller energy term, and CAD min/max distance only as an uncertainty modifier.

Impact probability / local proxy

Impact prob. % first uses an explicit CAD probability-like field if one exists. Otherwise the app computes only a compact local proxy when the CAD min/max interval overlaps the target-body radius. If the CAD lower bound is outside the radius, the local proxy is 0. A dash means insufficient data.

Additional computed context

Min km, Max km, 3σ span km, Miss radii, and Energy Mt TNT are derived values. Energy assumes a spherical object, estimated diameter and a default density of 3000 kg/m³.

Spacecraft/probe context catalog

Spacecraft context is app-derived. It compares the CAD body-centered miss-distance interval with an editable local radial catalog of artificial-object regions. This is screening context only, not live TLE/SPICE/ephemeris matching.

LLM corrections

Ollama may suggest corrections for app-derived display values. Suggestions are pending until the manual apply button is pressed. CAD/API fields are not overwritten.

Ollama notes

Long recurring CAD/simulation caveats are documented here, so the main Ollama answer can focus on the selected object, the article-style summary and the technical assessment.

Model memory

The keep-alive option asks Ollama to keep the selected model loaded between requests. Use the unload button to release RAM/VRAM.

Self-check

The app self-check validates local JSON files, themes, language packs, the spacecraft catalog and writable output/cache/log paths. It does not perform external network requests.

Surface / flyby viewpoint

The surface-view button creates a local HTML sky-view approximation. From the target surface it places the observer at the idealized sub-approach point; from the flyby-object viewpoint it shows how the target body would appear from the NEO. This is derived from the synthetic CAD trajectory and is not a real geographic visibility, brightness, atmosphere, rotation or SPICE/Horizons calculation.

Play Scenario education mode

The optional Panda3D scenario mode is a game-like educational view. It uses the same simplified CAD-derived sky-direction samples as the local viewpoint visualization, then adds stylized terrain, generated 3D objects, procedural textures, fullscreen WASD/mouse movement and telescope zoom. It is meant to make the geometry more intuitive, not to predict real visibility, terrain, weather, sound, brightness or observing conditions.

Spacecraft catalog editor

The Spacecraft Catalog tab edits data/spacecraft_regions.json. Entries are broad radial shells around target bodies where artificial objects may operate. They are not TLEs, SPICE kernels or live mission ephemerides. Save and reload the catalog after editing so the main table uses the updated context.

Authoritative verification

For real mission or impact-risk work, verify with official JPL/CNEOS, Horizons/SPICE, MPC observations and current mission ephemerides.
status_fetch_failed_cache_loaded: Live CAD fetch failed; loaded the last cached CAD snapshot instead.
tip_texture_mode: Choose whether the generated 3D HTML uses flat colors, simple procedural textures, or enhanced procedural textures for the central body and the flyby object.
column_source_cad: Source: NASA/JPL CAD API field or direct CAD unit conversion.
column_source_app: Source: app-derived value calculated locally from CAD fields.
tip_cad_column: This column comes from the NASA/JPL CAD payload or a direct unit conversion of a CAD field.
tip_app_derived_column: This column is computed by the app from visible CAD fields. Usage Notes describe the formulas and assumptions.
tip_llm_corrected_column: This app-derived value was overwritten by an Ollama correction. Re-fetching or disabling corrections restores the local calculation.
allow_llm_table_corrections: Allow Ollama to correct app-derived table fields
tip_allow_llm_table_corrections: When enabled, Ollama may return a structured correction block for app-derived columns such as Risk score, Impact prob. %, Spacecraft context, Risk score, Impact prob. % or Energy. The app stores these as pending review items; press Apply LLM-corrected values to write them into the table.
status_llm_table_corrections_applied: LLM-corrected app-derived values applied to the table.
tip_export_csv: Export the currently visible table, including CAD/API columns and app-derived columns, as a CSV file.
export_csv_no_data: There are no table rows to export yet.
tip_apply_llm_corrections: Apply pending Ollama-suggested corrections to app-derived table fields. CAD/API fields are not overwritten.
status_llm_table_corrections_pending: Ollama suggested {count} table correction(s). Review the answer and press Apply LLM-corrected values to use them.
llm_no_pending_corrections: There are no pending LLM table corrections to apply.
llm_no_pending_corrections_for_selection: There are no pending LLM corrections for the currently selected row.
llm_corrections_disabled_message: Enable LLM table corrections in Options before applying suggested values.
tip_llm_correction_status: Shows whether the last Ollama answer produced machine-readable pending table corrections.
keep_ollama_loaded: Keep selected Ollama model loaded between requests
tip_keep_ollama_loaded: When enabled, Ollama receives a keep_alive setting so the selected model stays resident between analyses and follow-up questions. The app asks Ollama to unload it when the app exits or when you use the unload button.
tip_unload_ollama_model: Ask Ollama to unload the selected model from RAM/VRAM now. This can free memory before switching to another model or closing other workloads.
unload_ollama_no_model: Select or enter an Ollama model name first.
status_ollama_unload_failed: Could not unload the Ollama model.
tip_include_spacecraft_context: When enabled, the app checks the CAD body-centered distance interval against a local approximate catalog of artificial-object regions, including Earth satellite shells, cislunar space, planet-orbiter shells and selected Lagrange-region distance shells.
spacecraft_note_no_catalog: no local spacecraft-region catalog for this body
tip_run_self_check: Validate local files, JSON catalogs, themes, language packs and writable output/cache/log folders without making external network requests.
ollama_no_model_message: Enter or select an Ollama model name before starting an analysis.
tip_surface_view_btn: Create and open a local HTML sky-view approximation from the selected body surface or from the flyby object. This uses the synthetic CAD-derived trajectory, not real ephemerides.
tip_surface_viewpoint: Choose whether the viewpoint is an idealized point on the target surface or the flyby object looking back at the target body.
tip_surface_view_span: Time span shown before and after modeled closest approach.
tip_scenario_engine: Auto uses Panda3D and selects the best available backend. HTML opens the browser-based viewpoint.
tip_play_scenario_btn: Launches a playful Panda3D educational 3D scene based on the selected CAD record. Uses WASD/mouse first-person controls; Esc quits.
status_play_scenario_started: Playable scenario launched. Esc quits the fullscreen scene.
play_scenario_failed_message: The playable scenario could not be started.
status_unloading_ollama_for_scene: Unloading Ollama model before fullscreen scenario: {model}...
status_unload_ollama_for_scene_failed: Could not unload Ollama before the scene; continuing. Details: {path}
catalog_intro: Edit the optional local spacecraft/probe region catalog used for broad artificial-object context. Entries are approximate radial shells, not live ephemerides or mission positions.
catalog_save_failed_message: The catalog could not be saved. Check the highlighted data and file permissions.
tip_catalog_table: Edit approximate artificial-object radial shells. Examples are separated with semicolons; append | note: text for a note.
tip_catalog_add: Add a new editable catalog row.
tip_catalog_delete: Delete selected catalog rows from the editor. Save afterwards to write the JSON file.
tip_catalog_reload: Reload the catalog editor from data/spacecraft_regions.json.
tip_catalog_save: Validate and save the edited catalog, then refresh the table context.
tip_catalog_open_file: Open data/spacecraft_regions.json in the system default editor.
log_intro: Application log for installer/runtime diagnostics, scenario subprocess output and caught errors. You can copy the full content and send it for debugging.
tip_copy_log: Copy the complete visible log text to the clipboard so it can be pasted into a support/debug message.
tip_open_log_folder: Open the folder that contains automatic app, error and Play Scenario log files.
tip_clear_log_view: Clear only the visible log tab. Existing log files are kept.
status_log_view_cleared: Visible log view cleared. Existing log files were kept.
status_play_scenario_started_logged: Playable scenario launched. Output is being written to: {path}
play_scenario_exited_message: The Play Scenario process exited with code {code}. Log file: {path}
play_scenario_running_message: A Play Scenario process is already running. Close it first or press Esc in the 3D scene.
tip_render_device: Choose the requested Panda3D rendering backend. The app logs the actual graphics vendor/renderer; exact GPU adapter selection is OS/driver dependent.
tip_shader_cache: Prepare and reuse stable Panda3D GLSL shader source files, then bind them to the low-poly scenario geometry where the backend supports them.
panda3d_missing_message: The Panda3D Play Scenario engine is not installed. Run install_windows.bat again so the standard requirements can install panda3d. The HTML/Plotly viewpoint remains usable.
status_panda3d_missing: The Panda3D Play Scenario engine is not installed.
